current_item: D-068 — Death checkpoint respawn and world-reset behavior
next_action: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting whether cleared rooms remain cleared and only the death room resets, the current checkpoint section resets deterministically while earlier checkpoint-banked sections stay cleared, or enemies may dynamically reclaim previously cleared rooms after death. Preserve checkpoint-banked strongboxes, fixed handcrafted teleport checkpoints, deterministic campaign mastery, difficulty-specific recovery rules, and quit-anytime single-use suspend-save intent from the recovered draft without presenting unverified details as final. Include repetition risk, challenge tension, speedrunning consistency, implementation complexity, and difficulty scaling. Put the agent recommendation after all A/B/C options, at the end of the card. After the user answers, persist D-068 to LIVE_DECISIONS.md, update intake_session.json, and update this handoff before asking anything else.
